prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Remember, every mountain is climbed one step at a time. You've been putting this task off, but that doesn't mean you can't tackle it now. In fact, the act of starting is always the hardest part. Once you begin, you'll find your momentum builds. You're capable of more than you think, so don't underestimate yourself. Take a deep breath, focus on the first step, and show that task who's boss. You've got this! I believe in you.
